findings.message: mod.ts must lead with `@module` JSDoc block (Public Types First)
README has only 1 TS code fences — needs ≥ 2 (basic + advanced) for the 80% path
forbidden folder name 'utils' — split into domain/, application/, or adapters/ aligned to a real concern
file is 1113 lines (cap 500) — split into smaller single-reason files
docs/architecture.md missing — required when public symbols > 25
`export default` — JSR penalises (no auto-doc); use named exports
